name: general_knowledge_mixed
description: Mixed difficulty: geography, science, history, math, CS terms. Pass = reply contains any listed substring (case-insensitive).

items.question: What is the capital of Germany? Reply with the city name only.
What is the capital of Japan? Reply with the city name only.
What is the largest ocean on Earth? Reply with the name only.
In which mountain range is Mount Everest located? Reply with one or two words.
Name one of the two longest rivers in the world by most common measures. Reply with the river name only.
At standard pressure, at what temperature in degrees Celsius does pure water freeze? Reply with the number only.
What is the atomic number of hydrogen? Reply with digits only.
What is the speed of light in vacuum in meters per second (approximate integer is fine)? Reply with digits only, no commas.
What does DNA stand for? Give the full English name (four words).
Which common gas do plants release during photosynthesis? Reply with the formula or common name.
In which year did the French Revolution traditionally begin with the storming of the Bastille? Reply with four digits only.
In which year did World War II end in most of Europe (Germany surrender)? Reply with four digits.
Who wrote the play Romeo and Juliet? Reply with the last name only.
Who is often called the first computer programmer? Reply with her first name.
What is the smallest prime number? Reply with the number only.
What is the square root of 144? Reply with digits only.
What is 15 multiplied by 17? Reply with digits only.
What is the 10th Fibonacci number if F(1)=1 and F(2)=1? Reply with digits only.
What is the derivative of x squared with respect to x? Reply in a short form like 2x.
What does HTML stand for? Reply with the expanded phrase (first word Hypertext).
What does CPU stand for? Reply with three words (first word Central).
What does HTTP status code 404 typically mean in one short phrase?
In algorithm analysis, what does Big-O notation O(1) describe? Reply with one word (the time/memory class).
If all cats are animals and Fluffy is a cat, is Fluffy an animal? Reply Yes or No only.
What is negative five multiplied by negative four? Reply with digits only.
What molecule in blood primarily carries oxygen to tissues? Name the protein or its shorthand.
What is the chemical symbol for gold? Reply with one or two letters.
Which planet in our solar system is famous for prominent rings? Reply with the planet name only.
